event.description: {CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking true branch. Now the value of {1} cannot be equal to {2}.}{{code{cookieEnabled}}}{{code{cookieEnabled}}}{0}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} cannot be equal to {2}.}{{code{cookieEnabled === null}}}{{code{cookieEnabled}}}{0}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking true branch. The truth value of {1} must be true.}{{code{cookieEnabled}}}{{code{cookieEnabled}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking true branch. Now the type of {1} cannot be any of {2}.}{{code{cookieEnabled}}}{{code{cookieEnabled}}}{{list{undefined}{null}{NaN}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the truth value of {1} must be true.}{{code{cookieEnabled === null}}}{{code{cookieEnabled}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the type of {1} cannot be any of {2}.}{{code{cookieEnabled === null}}}{{code{cookieEnabled}}}{{list{undefined}{null}{NaN}}}}}}
